statement: In every magma, Equation 2621 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * x)) * w`) implies Equation 4442 (`x * (y * x) = (y * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0262
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) x)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y x)) = (op (op y x) x)
